problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 280,000,000 people affected.
